_doc: Multi-agent NTFS test work list. See docs/multi-agent-test-protocol.md. Each scenario name is unique. status starts at 'pending'; agents transition via scripts/claim-scenario.sh.

mac-format-basic-256mib.note: Pass 3 — same post-Stage-2 frs.cxx:60f under iter14-v2 (SD now correct, mounts clean, but chkdsk verdict unchanged). Cause is NOT the missing SD; deeper structural issue (most likely $Extend or $Secure view-index attrs).

mac-format-mac-enumerate-empty._note: depends on Mac-side enumerate CLI; first agent picking this scaffolds tests/matrix/inspect/
mac-format-mac-enumerate-empty.note: Pass 3 — re-run under iter14-v2 (SD added in v2 layout); enumerate shows 11 system entries, 0 user-visible.

mac-format-win-write-mac-enumerate.note: Operation sequence needs the chkdsk-clean state iter15+ has to deliver.

win-format-win-write-mac-verify._note: Microsoft format.com is the canonical reference; this proves our reader handles Microsoft-format output
win-format-win-write-mac-verify.note: Operation sequence needs the chkdsk-clean state iter15+ has to deliver.

win-format-win-write-mac-write-win-verif._note: depends on Mac-side writer; first agent scaffolds it or marks blocked-on-writer
win-format-win-write-mac-write-win-verif.note: Filesystem::create_file plumbed via inspect_ntfs CLI; matrix runner glue (Mac-side touch invocation) not yet wired.

win-format-win-write-mac-delete-win-veri.note: Filesystem::unlink plumbed via inspect_ntfs CLI; matrix runner glue not yet wired.
